source_pr.title: test: stable and speed up one test case
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Try to solve the execution [fail](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/28203/pipeline) in CI unit test 
```
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] ----------------------------------------------------------------------
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] FAIL: 2pc_test.go:670: testCommitterSuite.TestAcquireFalseTimeoutLock
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] 
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] 2pc_test.go:712:
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z]     // it should return after about 300ms
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z]     c.Assert(elapsed, Less, 350*time.Millisecond)
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] ... compare_one time.Duration = 622795225 ("622.795225ms")
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] ... compare_two time.Duration = 350000000 ("350ms")
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] 
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] 
[2020-03-19T08:41:46.100Z] ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```

### What is changed and how it works?



### Related changes



### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: PR body links CI failure where elapsed time assertion exceeded (timing-sensitive test).
failure_signature: PR body links CI failure where elapsed time assertion exceeded (timing-sensitive test).
fix_pattern: test: stable and speed up one test case

evidence: evidence: PR body links CI failure where elapsed time assertion exceeded (timing-sensitive test).
evidence: diff removes strict elapsed < 350ms assertion and sets/restores `ManagedLockTTL` to stabilize TestAcquireFalseTimeoutLock (store/tikv/2pc_test.go).
